sglang.title: Add tensor.detach() back to update weight util
sglang.author: hebiao064
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add tensor.detach() to update weight util to avoid serialization error for Megatron Resharding to SGLang
Context
When I copy the update weight from VERL Code to SGLang code: #8267, I missed the tensor.detach() which is only needed in VERL Megatron TP=1 case.

sglang.title: [router] Implement HTTP Dependency Injection Pattern for Router System
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current router system passes the HTTP client as a parameter through every RouterTrait method, leading to:

Verbose method signatures that are difficult to maintain
PDRouter creating a redundant HTTP client that goes unused
Poor scalability when adding new dependencies (would require c

Motivation
Fix #7278 (comment)
Migrating fp8_blockwise_scaled_grouped_mm from H20 to H100, H200, and H800 resulted in a performance regression. After in-depth profiling, we identified several key causes of the regression:

The reduction in Mainloop execution time may not be enough to cover the Epilo

vllm.title: for glm-4.1V update
vllm.author: zRzRzRzRzRzRzR
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR aims to upgrade the implementation of GLM-4.1V to be compatible with GLM-V implementations that use different base models but share the same VIT.
The current PR is incorrect, as discussed on Slack, because the transformers library architectures do not appear in the text config.
